# BestAIAgent Organization

## Best AI Agent Directory

AI agent evaluations, rankings, and benchmarks for developers and businesses.
<span>10 public repositories</span>

---

### @BestAIAgent Social Preview

A platform evaluating AI agents across India-specific compliance (DPDP), Hinglish language support, INR pricing, and MCP compatibility.

---

### Organization Overview

BestAIAgent is the research and open-source arm of [BestAIAgent.in](https://bestaiagent.in), dedicated to:
- Maintaining open datasets and benchmark tooling for AI agents.
- Publishing reproducible evaluation reports for Indian and global markets.
- Building reference implementations and MCP integrations.

### Core Projects

- `best-ai-agent` — Site, tool evaluations, docs, research, and benchmark pipelines.
- `ai-agent-benchmarks` — Standardized language and latency benchmarks.
- `mcp-security-guide` — Controls for safe MCP deployments.
- `agent-rankings` — EEAT-based scoring models.

### Engagement

- Open to contributions, issues, and feature requests.
- Use GitHub Discussions for questions and roadmap input.
- See `CONTRIBUTING.md` before submitting PRs.

### Discover More

- Site: https://bestaiagent.in
